---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format: html
---

<div style="width:100%; text-align:center; margin-top:20px; margin-bottom:40px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;">

<h1 style="width:100%; text-align:center; font-size:6rem; font-weight:700; line-height:1.1; margin:0 auto 0 auto;">
HEADWISE
</h1>

<p style="font-size:1.9rem; max-width:900px; margin:0 auto 0 auto; text-align:center;">
Head Trauma Evaluation Algorithm for Deploying\
Warranted Imaging Safely and Efficient
</p>

<br>
<p style="font-size:1.6rem; max-width:900px; margin:0 auto 0 auto; text-align:center;">
A multicenter cluster-randomized trial
</p>

</div>

::: band-alt

<div style="font-size:1.2rem; line-height:2; text-align:center; max-width:900px; margin:auto;">

Minor head trauma is common in emergency departments

Approximately half of patients undergo CT scanning

The vast majority of scans are without relevant findings

Only 0–1% result in treatment

<br>

We hypothesize

that choosing wisely can safely reduce CT use by 25–30%

</div>
:::

<br>

:::: band-alt

<div style="display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center; flex-wrap:nowrap; margin-top:20px;">

  <img src="images/auh_logo.png" style="width:190px; height:auto; margin-right:30px;" />
  <img src="images/rmlogo.png" style="width:125px; height:auto; margin-right:30px;" />
  <img src="images/aulogo.png" style="width:260px; height:auto; margin-right:10px;" />
  <img src="images/aura_logo.png" style="width:240px; height:auto;" />

</div>

::::
